mapper.select:
SELECT t.* FROM kb_label_category t WHERE 1 = 1
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbLabelCategoryEntity.id},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{kbLabelCategoryEntity.name},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbLabelCategoryEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{kbLabelCategoryEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{kbLabelCategoryEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{kbLabelCategoryEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{kbLabelCategoryEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{kbLabelCategoryEntity.updateTime},'%')
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

select count(1) from kb_label_category t1 left join kb_category_label t2 on t1.id = t2.ct_id left join kb_model_label t3 on t2.l_id = t3.id where t1.is_deleted = 2 and t3.is_deleted = 2
AND t1.name like concat('%',#{kbLabelCategoryDto.name},'%')
AND t3.name like concat('%',#{kbLabelCategoryDto.labelName},'%')
